stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Two identical aircraft are flying at the same Mach number. Which of the following statements is true with regard to MCRIT?

options.a: Aircraft 1 has a higher MCRIT due to higher mass or higher altitude.
options.b: Aircraft 2 has a higher MCRIT due to higher mass or higher altitude.
options.c: Aircraft 1 and Aircraft 2 have the same MCRIT.
options.d: Aircraft 1 has a higher MCRIT due to lower mass or lower altitude.
